Local chain · Operator unlock

NoFeeSwap

Swap against your Hardhat pool through MetaMask. Built for clarity — same path the Operator uses on-chain.

Wallet

Quick setup
  • Import a Hardhat test account; add RPC http://127.0.0.1:8545 and chain ID 31337.
  • Pool & liquidity come from repo scripts — see README for transparency on quotes.

◆ Signed locally · NoFeeSwap assignment UI
